text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Countless Umamusume have come to the Three
Goddesses statue to carry on the dreams of
legends past, or to entrust their own to those yet
to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, those legacies spark inspiration in yet
another new runner!
